facebook.caption:
POV: you pull up to Regent Phu Quoc and just stand there for a second.

4.9 stars across 1,465 reviews. That number is almost unfair.

Situated inside Marina Integrated Resort Complex on đường Bào Dương Tơ, this property sets a bar that most of Phu Quoc isn't trying to clear. The kind of place where check-in already feels like the highlight.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: First look at Regent Phu Quoc. 4.9 stars. 1,465 people gave it that rating. Watch the lobby walk-through and tell me they're wrong. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption:

4.9★, 1,465 reviews. Save this.
